description: Extracts numeric coordinate values from a point or evaluates a function at a given x value. Useful for computing with point positions in expressions.
utility: Extract x/y coordinates from a point or evaluate a function at x

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: The point to extract coordinates from

alternates.description: Get x-coordinate as numeric value for use in expressions
Get y-coordinate as numeric value for use in expressions
Point on function curve at x, using a defined function

examples.expression:
f(x) = x^2
p = point(G, b, f(b))
